reason: The tiny project has a simple package install path but no durable local environment recovery model.

deductions.reason: README gives basic npm setup, but no Node version, env, service, or fresh-machine assumptions.

evidence.summary: Only npm install and npm test are documented.

recommendation.summary: Document Node version and local environment assumptions.

deductions.reason: No reset, cleanup, or recovery command exists.

recommendation.summary: Add reset or cleanup guidance when local state exists.
